title: Issue 2257 routed skill dependency closure

non_goals: Do not claim full #2257 closure in this PR.
Leave module/operation dependency closure, profile-matrix coverage, and build-time registry validation for follow-up slices.

effects: Add registry-declared resource dependency identities and resolve them before ordinary skill recommendation.
Expose unavailable skills with stable blocked reasons instead of advertising them as executable.
Route unresolved mandatory ordinary-skill dependencies into doctor health, actionability, and repair-plan output.
Keep package-backed declared resources executable and doctor-quiet while undeclared optional resources remain irrelevant.

selection.owner: This PR carries an explicitly partial #2257 live plan record; current checked-in Planning state remains owned by master and does not select #2257.

next_action: Keep remaining module/operation dependency closure, package-profile matrix coverage, and build-time registry validation live for follow-up #2257 slices after this bounded resource/routing/doctor repair-route slice lands.

claims: Registry-declared required skill resources resolve with stable identity, owner/source provenance, compatibility state, and reason code.
Compact task routing keeps matching unavailable skills out of executable recommendations and reports them as non-executable blocked recommendations.

Doctor consumes the same dependency identity for unresolved ordinary-skill dependencies and exposes non-healthy, action-required repair-plan output with either a dependency-correct executable managed repair route or a manual action-required route.
The package-backed equivalent remains executable and doctor-quiet; undeclared optional resources remain irrelevant.
requirements: uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json
refs: uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json: passed; warning_count=0
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json: passed; selected_module_health=healthy
uv run python scripts/check/run_operation_conformance_tests.py --target all: pass=19 fail=0 unavailable=0 skipped=0
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json: passed
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json: shape_in_sync

continuation.residual_intent: Add module/operation dependency closure, package-profile matrix coverage, and build-time registry validation before closing #2257.
